narrative.description: Overwatch is a team-based hero shooter where unique characters with distinct abilities cooperate to capture objectives or escort payloads.
narrative.core_loop: Select a hero role, coordinate ultimates and ability combos with teammates, contest objectives on fast-paced maps, and adapt team composition between rounds.

mechanics.map_notes: In Overwatch, weapons, armor, and accessories occupy distinct equipment slots and modify combat stats and abilities.
mechanics.expression: In Overwatch, weapons, armor, and accessories occupy distinct equipment slots and modify combat stats and abilities.

mechanics.map_notes: In Overwatch, direct player control over attacks, dodges, and combos in real time.
mechanics.expression: In Overwatch, direct player control over attacks, dodges, and combos in real time.

mechanics.map_notes: In Overwatch, matches are divided into rounds with separate health pools; winning a set number of rounds wins the match.
mechanics.expression: In Overwatch, matches are divided into rounds with separate health pools; winning a set number of rounds wins the match.

mechanics.map_notes: In Overwatch, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.
mechanics.expression: In Overwatch, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.

mechanics.map_notes: In Overwatch, units gain defensive bonuses from terrain cover and flanking angles on a tactical grid.
mechanics.expression: In Overwatch, units gain defensive bonuses from terrain cover and flanking angles on a tactical grid.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Overwatch through its core hero shooter loop.
